label: git-final
command:
git add -A && git commit -m "feat(T-REAL-001): real-world glossary task — agent created docs/GLOSSARY.md ✅

Tam döngü gerçek görevle kanıtlandı:
1. MemoryLayer.snapshot() → 4 dosya okundu (hash: 9aadb944fabd)
2. ContextBuilder.buildPrompt() → 13170 char (mission + arch + decisions + state + persona)
3. ProcessSpawner.spawnWithStdin() → stdin pipe (Windows cmd limit bypass, D009)
4. claude.exe --print --dangerously-skip-permissions → dosya yazma yetkisi
5. Agent 'documenter' 97s çalıştı, docs/GLOSSARY.md oluşturdu
6. OutputParser → 5/5 kabul kriteri geçti
7. DECISIONS.md → D011 loglandı
8. STATE.md → T-REAL-001 tamamlandı

docs/GLOSSARY.md: 3179 chars, 10 terim:
  MISSION.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, DECISIONS.md, STATE.md,
  Orchestrator, Agent Runner, Memory Layer,
  Memory Snapshot, Escalation, Context Injection

Fixes:
- ProcessSpawner: stdin pipe for prompts > 7000 chars (Windows cmd limit)
- AgentRunner: --dangerously-skip-permissions + --allowedTools flags
- 36/36 unit tests still passing" 2>&1
